note_1_business_description.summary: A Sub Above LLC, Delaware LLC, wholly-owned subsidiary of Jersey Mike's Funding LLC (Master Issuer). Primarily engaged in franchising Jersey Mike's restaurants.

note_2_accounting_policies.revenue_recognition: Royalty fees (ASC 606) recognized when earned. Franchise fees recognized over term of each franchise/ADA agreement as deferred revenue.
note_2_accounting_policies.restricted_cash: $8.7M for securitization reserves + franchisee/cooperative cash collected and transferred weekly.
note_2_accounting_policies.accounts_receivable: Royalty receivables, no reserve deemed necessary.
note_2_accounting_policies.intangible_assets: Trademark, area service agreements, software, website. Straight-line amortization.
note_2_accounting_policies.income_taxes: Disregarded entity for federal taxes. Minimal state income taxes ($825 in 2024). Earnings included in Jersey Mike's Inc. consolidated returns.
note_2_accounting_policies.fair_value: Level 1/2/3 hierarchy; financial instruments at cost approximating fair value.

note_3_securitization.initial_2019: Parent contributed IP, franchise agreements, ADA agreements to Company. License agreement back to Parent.
note_3_securitization.management_agreement: JMFS receives annual base fees + percentage of cash collections for management services.
note_3_securitization.dependency: Master Issuer dependent on Company for cash flows to service senior notes.

note_1_business.vies_identified: Certain franchisees are VIEs; Company not primary beneficiary — not consolidated.
note_1_business.canada_acquisition: Acquired noncontrolling 49% of Canada entity Q3 2023; sold Canada stores March 2024.

note_2_accounting.gift_card: JM Gift Card Operating Co. LLC formed for gift card restructuring.

note_4_securitization.secured_by: Substantially all assets of Master Issuer and subsidiaries

note_7_unconsolidated_affiliates.description: Advances to franchise locations not owned by sole stockholder/family

blackstone_acquisition.buyer: Submarine Buyer LLC (controlled by Blackstone Inc. affiliates)
blackstone_acquisition.earnout: Up to $250M additional, payable upon certain conditions or change in control
blackstone_acquisition.structure: Jersey Mike's Inc. formed Jersey Mike's HoldCo LLC to hold 100% of Company equity
blackstone_acquisition.entities_transferred_to_seller: 2251 Landmark Place LLC and Farnborough LLC (decreases P&E ~$79M and notes payable ~$56M)
blackstone_acquisition.purchase_price_allocation: Not yet complete; expected within measurement period (up to 1 year)
